allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Content index.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; \(Get-Content approvedbycyril.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; \(Get-Content property-management.html | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell($tools = 'ffmpeg','magick','cwebp','npx'; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t : FOUND" } else { "$t : missing" } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $files = @\('logo.png','logo no background.png','Cyril 5.jpg','refi.jpg','debt consolidation.jpg','ReverseMortgage.jpg','favicon.png'\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\(\(Resolve-Path $f\)\); "{0} : {1}x{2}" -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height; $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $rb = $shell.Namespace\(0xA\); $rbSize = 0; $rb.Items\(\) | ForEach-Object { $rbSize += $_.Size }; "Recycle Bin: {0:N0} MB" -f \($rbSize/1MB\); $npmCache = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'npm-cache'; if \(Test-Path $npmCache\) { "npm cache: {0:N0} MB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem $npmCache -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\) }; if \(Test-Path C:\\Windows.old\) { 'Windows.old EXISTS' }; "Downloads: {0:N0} MB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\))

PowerShell($ff = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'ffmpeg-tool\\node_modules\\ffmpeg-static\\ffmpeg.exe'; & $ff -hide_banner -i house.mp4 -f null - -t 0.1 2>&1 | Select-String 'Duration|Stream' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })

PowerShell($d = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'qr-tool'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $d | Out-Null; Set-Location $d; npm install qrcode --no-save --loglevel=error; node -e "const QR = require\('qrcode'\); const url = 'https://www.ottawarentalplug.ca/leave-review'; QR.toFile\('C:/Users/cyril/OneDrive/Desktop/Website-Private/qr-leave-review.png', url, { errorCorrectionLevel: 'H', width: 1200, margin: 2, color: { dark: '#0f1c2e', light: '#ffffff' } }, e => { if \(e\) throw e; QR.toDataURL\(url, { errorCorrectionLevel: 'H', width: 600, margin: 1, color: { dark: '#0f1c2e', light: '#ffffff' } }, \(e2, uri\) => { if \(e2\) throw e2; require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('C:/Users/cyril/OneDrive/Desktop/Website-Private/qr-datauri.txt', uri\); console.log\('QR generated, datauri length: ' + uri.length\); }\); }\);")

PowerShell($d = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'qr-tool'; Set-Location $d; node -e "const QR = require\('qrcode'\); QR.toFile\('C:/Users/cyril/OneDrive/Desktop/Website-Private/qr-leave-review.png', 'https://ottawarentalplug.com/leave-review', { errorCorrectionLevel: 'H', width: 1200, margin: 2, color: { dark: '#0f1c2e', light: '#ffffff' } }, e => { if \(e\) throw e; console.log\('QR regenerated for .com'\); }\);"; Set-Location 'C:\\Users\\cyril\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Website'; $p = 'C:\\Users\\cyril\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Website-Private\\review-card-print.html'; $c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($p\); $c = $c.Replace\('ottawarentalplug.ca','ottawarentalplug.com'\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($p, $c\); "card updated")
